Votes % EV Votes % EV Votes % EV Votes % EV
Alabama 13,100 2,400 18.3 9,000 68.7 5 100 0.8 1,500 11.5
Connecticut 10,100 7,000 69.3 8 100 1.0 2,800 27.7 100 1.0
Delaware 3 electors chosen by state legislature: 2 for Hypothetical; 1 for Notional
Georgia 9 electors chosen by state legislature and awarded to Jebediah Fictitious
Louisiana 5 electors chosen by state legislature: 3 for Fictitious; 2 for Notional
New York 36 electors chosen by state legislature:
15 to Fictitious; 14 to Notional; 5 to Spurious; 2 to Hypothetical
South Carolina 11 electors chosen by state legislature and awarded to Jebediah Fictitious
Vermont 7 electors chosen by state legislature and awarded to Millicent Notional
Virginia 14,800 2,000 13.5 4,000 27.0 400 2.7 8,300 56.1 24
Totals 38,000 11,400 30.0 32 13,100 34.5 43 3,300 8.7 5 9,900 26.1 28
Millicent Notional was elected by the House of Representatives.
